data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Location-specific pricing (downtown premium)', but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the pricing differences between locations. While the linked use case mentions a 10% higher price downtown, there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this pricing structure. Therefore, the assessment reveals a gap in the evidence needed to satisfy the requirement.
gaps: No evidence provided to confirm location-specific pricing for downtown premium.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
